name: Sturgis Indoor Golf
about: Sturgis Indoor Golf is a golf simulator venue featuring TruGolf Apogee launch monitors and TruGolf Apex software. They offer standard simulators and a semi-private 'Garage' room, with a focus on providing a realistic indoor golfing experience. Pricing is per hour with punch card options available, and the facility includes a pro shop, private lessons, and food and drink services.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced TruGolf Apogee launch monitors for precise data
Semi-private 'Garage' room with a TV and soundbar
On-site pro shop with Cleveland Golf and Srixon products
Food and beverage options available in each simulator bay

food_and_drink.notes: Candy Bars, Chips, Beef Sticks, and other food items
Bar for snacks and beverages available in each bay

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue allows both right and left-handed golfers, but it is not explicitly stated whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a bar for snacks and beverages in each simulator bay, but outside food and drinks are not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is suitable for families, but specific kid-friendly amenities or policies are not detailed.
